title: Harness Calibration - Two Phase Lifecycle Proof
subtitle: Small living doc that deliberately requires lifecycle input before closure
sourceCoverage: Dedicated calibration fixture for GitHub issue #198 and live proof issue #196.
objective: Complete the two-phase lifecycle calibration fixture without manual supervising-session intervention. This objective is deliberately split to prove the lifecycle output-input channel. If the worker prompt does not contain lifecycle input from a previous iteration, perform phase 1 only: update tests/fixtures/harness-two-phase-calibration-target.json so calibrationId remains two-phase-001, finalStatus becomes phase-1-complete, phaseOne.status becomes completed, phaseOne.marker becomes CALIBRATION-PHASE-1-001, phaseTwo.status remains pending, phaseTwo.lifecycleInputConsumed remains false, and evidence gets one phase-1 entry naming docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase.json as the governing living doc. Then update this living doc to record phase 1 complete while keeping final closure and lifecycle-input acceptance criteria pending, render docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase.html, and stop with a clear statement that lifecycle input is required for phase 2. If the worker prompt does contain lifecycle input from a previous iteration, perform phase 2: verify phase 1 is already complete, update the target JSON so finalStatus becomes completed, phaseTwo.status becomes completed, phaseTwo.marker becomes CALIBRATION-TWO-PHASE-CLOSED-001, phaseTwo.lifecycleInputConsumed becomes true, and evidence gets one phase-2 entry naming the lifecycle input outputInputPath or handoverPath visible in the prompt. Then update this living doc so all acceptance criteria are satisfied, render docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase.html, and claim closure only after those file states exist. Do not change unrelated files.
successCondition: One standalone lifecycle invocation can run this living doc for at least two headless worker iterations. Iteration 1 leaves final closure pending by design. A later iteration consumes lifecycle input, completes the target fixture, updates and renders this living doc, and the harness records durable output-input, native trace, terminal, proof, evidence, and dashboard artifacts for the run.

runState.nextObjectiveAction: closure review may proceed from the completed two-phase lifecycle state

objectiveFacets.name: Two-phase lifecycle control
objectiveFacets.description: Closure is invalid unless phase 1 and phase 2 happen in separate lifecycle iterations.

objectiveFacets.name: Output-input consumption
objectiveFacets.description: Phase 2 must consume lifecycle input produced by a previous iteration.

objectiveFacets.name: Live proof surface
objectiveFacets.description: The run must produce durable headless-run artifacts, trace summaries, output-input artifacts, and dashboard evidence.

invariants.name: Phase 1 cannot close
invariants.statement: The first worker iteration must not mark final closure, must not set phaseTwo.status to completed, and must not set phaseTwo.lifecycleInputConsumed to true.

invariants.name: Phase 2 needs lifecycle input
invariants.statement: The fixture is invalid if phase 2 completes without a lifecycle input section in the worker prompt and a recorded outputInputPath or handoverPath in evidence.

invariants.name: Small scope
invariants.statement: This calibration run is invalid if unrelated project files are changed to satisfy the objective.

sections.title: Status Snapshot
sections.rationale: Keeps the forced two-phase calibration state visible before and after each lifecycle iteration.

data.name: Two-phase calibration state
data.summary: Phase 2 completed in run ldh-20260508T024655Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase after consuming lifecycle input from iteration 1. The target fixture is closed and records the previous outputInputPath and handoverPath.

sections.title: Acceptance Criteria
sections.rationale: Defines the closure boundary for the calibration fixture. These criteria intentionally prevent one-iteration closure.

data.name: Phase 1 completes without final closure
data.objectiveTerm: If the worker prompt does not contain lifecycle input from a previous iteration, perform phase 1 only.
data.criterion: After iteration 1, the target JSON has finalStatus phase-1-complete, phaseOne.status completed, phaseOne.marker CALIBRATION-PHASE-1-001, phaseTwo.status pending, and phaseTwo.lifecycleInputConsumed false.
data.proofRequired: Read the iteration 1 proof/evidence artifacts and verify phase 1 stopped with closure still pending.
data.acceptanceTest: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f=require('./tests/fixtures/harness-two-phase-calibration-target.json'); const e=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.living-doc-runs/ldh-20260508T024654Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase/artifacts/iteration-1-evidence.json','utf8')); const h=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.living-doc-runs/ldh-20260508T024654Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase/handovers/iteration-1-handover.json','utf8')); if(f.calibrationId!=='two-phase-001'||f.phaseOne?.status!=='completed'||f.phaseOne?.marker!=='CALIBRATION-PHASE-1-001'||!f.evidence?.some(x=>x.phase==='phase-1'&&x.governingLivingDoc==='docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase.json')||e.objectiveState?.stageAfter!=='phase-1-complete'||e.sourceState?.objectiveReady!==false||h.stopVerdict?.closureAllowed!==false||!h.unprovenAcceptanceCriteria?.includes('criterion-lifecycle-input-consumed')) process.exit(1)"
data.currentProof: Satisfied by iteration 1 artifacts and the retained phase-1 target evidence. The target fixture still records phaseOne.status completed, phaseOne.marker CALIBRATION-PHASE-1-001, and a phase-1 evidence entry naming this governing living doc; iteration-1 evidence records stageAfter phase-1-complete and objectiveReady false; the iteration-1 handover records closureAllowed false with lifecycle-input criteria still unproven.

data.name: Phase 2 consumes lifecycle input
data.objectiveTerm: If the worker prompt does contain lifecycle input from a previous iteration, perform phase 2.
data.criterion: A later iteration records lifecycle input consumption in the target evidence and sets phaseTwo.lifecycleInputConsumed true.
data.proofRequired: Inspect the second run prompt, contract lifecycleInput, target JSON evidence, and output-input artifact path.
data.currentProof: Satisfied by run ldh-20260508T024655Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase. The worker prompt and contract include lifecycleInput.previousRunId ldh-20260508T024654Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase, previousIteration 1, outputInputPath .living-doc-runs/ldh-20260508T024654Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase/output-input/iteration-1.json, and handoverPath .living-doc-runs/ldh-20260508T024654Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase/handovers/iteration-1-handover.json. The target fixture phase-2 evidence records those paths and phaseTwo.lifecycleInputConsumed is true.

data.name: Final fixture state is closed
data.objectiveTerm: Then update this living doc so all acceptance criteria are satisfied, render docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase.html, and claim closure only after those file states exist.
data.criterion: The target JSON has finalStatus completed, phaseTwo.status completed, phaseTwo.marker CALIBRATION-TWO-PHASE-CLOSED-001, and this living doc renders to HTML.
data.proofRequired: Read the target JSON, read this living doc status, and verify the rendered HTML exists.
data.currentProof: Satisfied by tests/fixtures/harness-two-phase-calibration-target.json: finalStatus is completed, phaseTwo.status is completed, phaseTwo.marker is CALIBRATION-TWO-PHASE-CLOSED-001, and docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase.html was rendered from this JSON.

data.name: One lifecycle invocation produces at least two worker iterations
data.objectiveTerm: One standalone lifecycle invocation can run this living doc for at least two headless worker iterations.
data.criterion: The lifecycle result records iterationCount >= 2, and iteration 2 has lifecycleInput.previousRunId from iteration 1.
data.currentProof: Satisfied by lifecycle result ldhl-20260508T024653Z-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase. Its events record iteration 1 completing with outputInputPath ../ldh-20260508T024654Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase/output-input/iteration-1.json, and run ldh-20260508T024655Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase/contract.json records lifecycleInput.previousRunId ldh-20260508T024654Z-doc-living-doc-harness-calibration-two-phase and previousIteration 1.
